entities.name: RESOURCE ALLOCATION METHODOLOGY
entities.description: A methodology to assist in the determination of an appropriate regional allocation of research resources to mandate crops in mandate regions.

entities.name: MANDATE CROPS
entities.description: Crops that fall under the institutional mandate of ICRISAT.

entities.name: MANDATE REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic regions that fall under the institutional mandate of ICRISAT.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics.

entities.name: PRIORITY INDICES
entities.description: Indices developed based on criteria for equity and efficiency to determine research priorities.

entities.name: EQUITY
entities.description: A criterion used for the development of priority indices for resource allocation.

entities.name: EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A criterion used for the development of priority indices for resource allocation.

entities.name: RESEARCH RESOURCE ALLOCATION
entities.description: The process of distributing research resources across different crops and regions.
